headline: Is It Time To Reassess Invitation Homes (INVH) After A 15% One Year Share Price Decline
summary: Investors may be wondering whether Invitation Homes at around US$27.93 is starting to look like a bargain or still has room to fall further on valuation grounds. The stock is up 3.3% over the past month and 0.8% year to date, but has declined 2.8% over the last week and is down 15.4% over the past year. These moves may have some investors reassessing both its potential upside and its risks. Recent coverage has largely focused on broader residential real estate trends and how they affect...
